mapper.sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT AA.* , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM AS TOWER_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM AS REPORT_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM || '_' || RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM AS RESOURCE_UNIQUE_ID , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD || '_' || CONTRACT_NO || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ || '_' || BASELINE_ID AS LINK_ID FROM ( SELECT VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY/MM') AS BILL_MONTH_ORG , VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || 'T00:00:00Z' AS BILL_MONTH , A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_NM , A.CONTRACT_NO , A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM , '' AS RESOURCE_TYPE_CD , '' AS RESOURCE_TYPE_NM , A.BASELINE_ID AS TOWER_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('TOWER_TYPE', A.BASELINE_ID) AS TOWER_TYPE_NM , '' AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , '' AS REPORT_CATEGORY_NM , '' AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD , '' AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM , 0 AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_SEQ , A.BASELINE_ID , CASE WHEN A.USAGE = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.USAGE AS DEC(16,2)), '999,999,999,999.00') END AS USAGE , CASE WHEN A.RATE = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.RATE AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') END AS RATE , CASE WHEN A.APPLY_RATE = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.APPLY_RATE AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') END AS APPLY_RATE , CASE WHEN A.SERVICE_DAYS = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.SERVICE_DAYS AS INTEGER), '999,999,999,999') END AS SERVICE_DAYS , CASE WHEN A.DAYS = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.DAYS AS INTEGER), '999,999,999,999') END AS DAYS , CASE WHEN A.AMOUNT = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.AMOUNT AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') END AS AMOUNT , CASE WHEN A.USAGE_TPMC = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.USAGE_TPMC AS DEC(16,2)), '999,999,999,999.00') END AS USAGE_TPMC , A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE , A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || 'T00:00:00Z' AS SERVICE_ADD_DELETE_DATE , A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ , A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ AS SERVICE_ADD_DELETE_SEQ , A.REMARK , 0 AS ORDER_NO , A.REG_USER_ID , A.REG_DT , A.HIST_SEQ FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL_HIST A WHERE CHARGE_TYPE_CD = '001' ) AA UNION ALL SELECT AA.* , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM AS TOWER_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM AS REPORT_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM || '_' || RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM AS RESOURCE_UNIQUE_ID , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD || '_' || CONTRACT_NO || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ || '_' || BASELINE_ID AS LINK_ID FROM ( SELECT VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY/MM') AS BILL_MONTH_ORG , VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || 'T00:00:00Z' AS BILL_MONTH , A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_NM , A.CONTRACT_NO , A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM , B.RESOURCE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_TYPE', B.RESOURCE_TYPE_CD) AS RESOURCE_TYPE_NM , B.TOWER_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('TOWER_TYPE', B.TOWER_TYPE_CD) AS TOWER_TYPE_NM , B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) AS REPORT_CATEGORY_NM , B.RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_CATEGORY', B.RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD) AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM , B.ORDER_NO AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_SEQ , CASE WHEN A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD = '001' THEN B.TOWER_TYPE_CD ELSE B.BASELINE_ID END AS BASELINE_ID , CASE WHEN A.USAGE = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.USAGE AS DEC(16,2)), '999,999,999,999.00') END AS USAGE , CASE WHEN A.RATE = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.RATE AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') END AS RATE , CASE WHEN A.APPLY_RATE = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.APPLY_RATE AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') END AS APPLY_RATE , CASE WHEN A.SERVICE_DAYS = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.SERVICE_DAYS AS INTEGER), '999,999,999,999') END AS SERVICE_DAYS , CASE WHEN A.DAYS = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.DAYS AS INTEGER), '999,999,999,999') END AS DAYS , CASE WHEN A.AMOUNT = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.AMOUNT AS DEC(16,0)), '999,999,999,999') END AS AMOUNT , CASE WHEN A.USAGE_TPMC = 0 THEN '' ELSE VARCHAR_FORMAT(CAST(A.USAGE_TPMC AS DEC(16,2)), '999,999,999,999.00') END AS USAGE_TPMC , A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE , A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || 'T00:00:00Z' AS SERVICE_ADD_DELETE_DATE , A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ , A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ AS SERVICE_ADD_DELETE_SEQ , A.REMARK , B.ORDER_NO , A.REG_USER_ID , A.REG_DT , A.HIST_SEQ FROM ( SELECT * FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL_HIST WHERE CHARGE_TYPE_CD <> '001' ) A, TB_BILL_RESOURCE B WHERE A.BASELINE_ID = B.BASELINE_ID ) AA )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT AA.* , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM AS TOWER_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM AS REPORT_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM || '_' || RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM AS RESOURCE_UNIQUE_ID , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD || '_' || CONTRACT_NO || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ || '_' || CHARGE_TYPE_NM AS LINK_ID FROM ( SELECT VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY/MM') AS BILL_MONTH_ORG , VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || 'T00:00:00Z' AS BILL_MONTH , A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_NM , A.CONTRACT_NO , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM , '' AS RESOURCE_TYPE_CD , '' AS RESOURCE_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(A.BASELINE_ID) AS TOWER_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(A.BASELINE_ID) AS TOWER_TYPE_NM , '' AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , '' AS REPORT_CATEGORY_NM , '' AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD , '' AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM , 0 AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_SEQ , A.BASELINE_ID , A.USAGE , A.RATE , A.APPLY_RATE , A.SERVICE_DAYS , A.DAYS , CAST(A.AMOUNT AS INTEGER) AS AMOUNT , A.USAGE_TPMC , VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || 'T00:00:00Z' AS SERVICE_APPLY_DATE , '#01' AS SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ , A.REMARK , 0 AS ORDER_NO , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(BASELINE_ID) AS TOWER_UNIQUE_ID , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(BASELINE_ID) || '_' || '' AS REPORT_UNIQUE_ID , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(BASELINE_ID) || '_' || '' || '_' || '' AS RESOURCE_UNIQUE_ID , A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD || '_' || A.CONTRACT_NO || '_' || COALESCE(A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE, '') || '_' || COALESCE(A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ, '') || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(BASELINE_ID) AS LINK_ID , A.REG_USER_ID , A.REG_DT , A.HIST_SEQ FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL_HIST A WHERE CHARGE_TYPE_CD = '001' ) AA UNION ALL SELECT AA.* , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM AS TOWER_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM AS REPORT_UNIQUE_ID , CHARGE_TYPE_NM || '_' || TOWER_TYPE_NM || '_' || REPORT_CATEGORY_NM || '_' || RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM AS RESOURCE_UNIQUE_ID , CONTRACT_TYPE_CD || '_' || CONTRACT_NO || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || '_' || SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ || '_' || BASELINE_ID AS LINK_ID FROM ( SELECT VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY/MM') AS BILL_MONTH_ORG , VARCHAR_FORMAT(DATE(TO_DATE(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || 'T00:00:00Z' AS BILL_MONTH , A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CONTRACT_TYPE', A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD) AS CONTRACT_TYPE_NM , A.CONTRACT_NO , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) AS CHARGE_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_TYPE', B.RESOURCE_TYPE_CD) AS RESOURCE_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_TYPE', B.RESOURCE_TYPE_CD) AS RESOURCE_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(B.TOWER_TYPE_CD) AS TOWER_TYPE_CD , FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(B.TOWER_TYPE_CD) AS TOWER_TYPE_NM , FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) AS REPORT_CATEGORY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) AS REPORT_CATEGORY_NM , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_CATEGORY', B.RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD) AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_CATEGORY', B.RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD) AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_NM , B.ORDER_NO AS RESOURCE_CATEGORY_SEQ , CASE WHEN A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD = '001' THEN B.TOWER_TYPE_CD ELSE B.BASELINE_ID END AS BASELINE_ID , A.USAGE , A.RATE , A.APPLY_RATE , A.SERVICE_DAYS , A.DAYS , CAST(A.AMOUNT AS INTEGER) AS AMOUNT , A.USAGE_TPMC , A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || 'T00:00:00Z' AS SERVICE_APPLY_DATE , A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ , A.REMARK , B.ORDER_NO , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(B.TOWER_TYPE_CD) AS TOWER_UNIQUE_ID , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(B.TOWER_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) AS REPORT_UNIQUE_ID , FN_GET_CODE_NM('CHARGE_TYPE', A.CHARGE_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_ELK_TOWER_TYPE_NM(B.TOWER_TYPE_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_CODE_NM('REPORT_CATEGORY', B.REPORT_CATEGORY_CD) || '_' || FN_GET_CODE_NM('RESOURCE_CATEGORY', B.RESOURCE_CATEGORY_CD) AS RESOURCE_UNIQUE_ID , A.CONTRACT_TYPE_CD || '_' || A.CONTRACT_NO || '_' || A.SERVICE_APPLY_DATE || '_' || A.SERVICE_APPLY_SEQ || '_' || B.BASELINE_ID AS LINK_ID , A.REG_USER_ID , A.REG_DT , A.HIST_SEQ FROM ( SELECT * FROM TB_BILL_DETAIL_HIST WHERE CHARGE_TYPE_CD <> '001' ) A, TB_BILL_RESOURCE B WHERE A.BASELINE_ID = B.BASELINE_ID ) AA )
